businessDescription: An online store selling practical tech accessories, lifestyle products, and giftable everyday essentials.
toneOfVoice: professional, friendly, concise, and sales-focused without being pushy
location: Online store serving Slovenia and the EU

products.name: Aurora Wireless Earbuds
products.description: Bluetooth earbuds with charging case, noise reduction, and up to 24 hours total battery life.

products.name: FlexCharge 3-in-1 Dock
products.description: Charging dock for phone, smartwatch, and earbuds.

products.name: MetroPack Travel Organizer
products.description: Compact organizer for cables, chargers, cards, and travel essentials.

products.name: Luma Desk Lamp
products.description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with three brightness modes.

policies.name: Shipping
policies.details: Standard delivery is usually 2-5 business days after payment confirmation.

policies.name: Returns
policies.details: Customers can request a return within 14 days if the item is unused and in original packaging.

policies.name: Order confirmation
policies.details: New order and product requests collected by the chatbot are pending until the store team confirms them.

faqs.question: Can I track my order?
faqs.answer: Yes. Ask the customer for their order number and email, then mark the request as pending for the team.

faqs.question: Can I reserve an item?
faqs.answer: Collect the customer name, email or phone, product name, quantity, and notes. Reservations are pending confirmation.

faqs.question: Do prices include VAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, listed prices include VAT unless the store owner changes this config.
